/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/src/neon_lab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/neon_lab.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o neon_lab  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
